metadata.hypothesis: Currencyservice is experiencing resource saturation (memory/CPU) leading to degraded responsiveness; frontend and downstream services depend on it and exhibit downstream strain as a result.
metadata.llm_reasoning: Metric summary shows currencyservice with strong resource anomaly (mem_jump > 0.3 and CPU z near high but below 30) and max_severity indicating resource saturation. Adservice and shippingservice also show metric anomalies but to a lesser extent. Frontend depends directly on currencyservice; the upstream root-cause (currencyservice) aligns with the strongest metric signal and the known topology. Log-rate anomalies are secondary (no explicit error keywords), so the metric-driven pattern supports currencyservice as the primary root-causing service with cascading effects.

metadata.llm_reasoning: The symptom service frontend directly calls currencyservice, so a fault in currencyservice is a structurally plausible root cause path (frontend -> currencyservice). No alternative direct paths from frontend to currencyservice exist in the given topology; other dependencies (cart, product catalog, etc.) are unrelated to the suspected downstream. With the blast radius limited by the graph, frontend is the primary affected service; if currencyservice were to fail or degrade further, frontend would be most impacted among the affected set. The topology explicitly supports the log agent’s hypothesis that currencyservice is downstream of the symptom.

result.synthesis_reasoning: All sources agree that currencyservice is a plausible upstream cause: Log Agent detects resource saturation in currencyservice; Topology confirms a direct frontend -> currencyservice path with currencyservice as a plausible upstream contributor to frontend degradation. The TCB-RCA algorithm, however, ranks frontend as the root with high internal causality confidence but zero observed anomalies for frontend and no supporting log evidence, creating a conflict. Given the observable resource signals and the structurally plausible propagation path, currencyservice is the strongest root-cause candidate. The presence of a secondary, lower-confidence frontend candidate reflects the method’s disagreement but should not override the stronger, multi-source signal pointing to currencyservice. The most plausible propagation path from root to symptom is currencyservice -> frontend, consistent with topology and the observed symptom in frontend.
